# agentops_resource_types (Data Source)

The authorization resource types available to this account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "agentops_resource_types" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `resource_types` (Attributes List) Available authorization resource types. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--resource_types))

<a id="nestedatt--resource_types"></a>
### Nested Schema for `resource_types`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String) The resource type key.
- `notes` (String) Notes describing the resource type.
- `scope` (String) The scope of the resource type.
